message:
test(email-generic,sonos): expand connector unit tests for error mapping, config validation, and lifecycle

email-generic: 30+ new tests for connector identity, operations catalog,
safety tiers, capability mapping, introspect, doctor, manifest hash,
configure/health/self_check/subscribe/shutdown lifecycle, config
validation (empty hosts, passwords, from addresses, zero timeouts).
Add ConnectorErrorMapping impl with is_retryable() and error display tests.

sonos: 15+ new tests for error mapping (API status codes, retryable
classification, display formatting), ConnectorErrorMapping impl, and
config validation (defaults, custom values, rejection of bad schemes,
empty URLs, zero timeouts).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
